chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1454 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5781/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 03.12.2024 Mr. Daim Hussain Bhanbhro, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh Respondent No.1 Lal Bux present in person >>>>>..<<<<< At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioners files statement jointly signed by Petitioner No.1(c), namely Moor Khan himself and as attorney of the remaining petitioners as well as respondent No.1, namely Lal Bux, seeks withdrawal of this petition in terms mentioned under it. Learned AAG submits that subject to non-violation of the rights of the government, he has no objection. Accordingly, and in view of the above, instant petition is hereby disposed of along with pending applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
